ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
NTC OF NON-APPEARANCE FILED BY PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. F.K.A. MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONERS FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.'S (F.K.A. MBNA AMERICA BANK) PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (PRINCIPAL - $ 12,716.48) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
